data_access: P3 train and validation arrays only; sealed P3 test prohibited

gap_style_lp.label: GAP-style inference-closed LP adaptation
gap_style_lp.provenance: mechanism adaptation from the official GAP paper and repository; not an official GAP reproduction
gap_style_lp.public_encoder: row-normalized randomized TruncatedSVD of registered public descriptors
gap_style_lp.selection_metric: mean global ROC-AUC across five frozen validation seeds
gap_style_lp.score: equal-weight mean cosine over public and cached noisy aggregation channels
gap_style_lp.composition: adaptive sequential composition across hops; parallel composition across disjoint client-owned edges
gap_style_lp.inference: post-processing of public descriptors and cached DP aggregation matrices; no private graph reread

dplp_icde_2024.label: ICDE 2024 DPLP path-subgraph baseline
dplp_icde_2024.provenance: paper available; no verified official implementation located
admission_blockers: reproduce degree projection and path-subgraph extraction
verify edge-influence multiplicity under the implemented negative sampler
rederive the sampled Gaussian RDP accountant under the P3 edge unit
declare centralized trusted-curator scope as different from visible federated messages

closest_centralized_edge_dp_lp.label: centralized edge-DP public-pair classifier
closest_centralized_edge_dp_lp.provenance: conservative closest formal baseline; not DPLP and not an official reproduction
closest_centralized_edge_dp_lp.selection_metric: mean global ROC-AUC across five frozen validation seeds
closest_centralized_edge_dp_lp.sensitivity_reason: one positive insertion plus at most one stable-negative deletion and one replacement insertion
closest_centralized_edge_dp_lp.composition: 20 adaptive full-batch Gaussian releases composed in RDP
closest_centralized_edge_dp_lp.adversary: centralized trusted curator; privacy-scope mismatch to visible federated messages
closest_centralized_edge_dp_lp.inference: DP model and public pair features only; no graph reread
